ksa_text: Deploy, operate, and maintain continuous monitoring and alerting systems for analytical environments, including configuring telemetry, performing monitoring data assessments, triaging triggered events, and coordinating incident response.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Applied Analytics & BI KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.418) to justify inclusion for the VP Data Platform. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world VP Data Platform roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for VP Data Platform roles increasingly include Applied Analytics & BI competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for VP Data Platform now include Applied Analytics & BI competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Applied Analytics & BI task KSA is relevant to the VP Data Platform based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
